reconcile_to: Schedule K net rental real estate (Form 8825) = book net; ordinary line 21 = 0
_doc: SWEET HOME KC LLC (S-corp, EIN 93-2942628), 100% Michael Arbach. 100% rental real estate (3 KC-MO properties) -> Form 8825 -> Schedule K line 2 (NOT ordinary). Year-agnostic map. The books do NOT split expenses per property, so all rental income + expenses aggregate into ONE 8825 property item (item_group 'rental'); the per-property split is a refinement (NEEDS_DOC). Net rental = gross rents - expenses = book net.
